heading: Repealed. ,Feb. 26, 1944, ch. 65, § 1858 Stat. 104
label: 632 to 644 Repealed. ,Feb. 26, 1944, ch. 65, § 1858 Stat. 104
notes: Section 632, , , prohibited killing seal or sea otter in certain waters of North Pacific.act Aug. 24, 1912, ch. 373, § 137 Stat. 499
Section 633, , , forbade equipping vessels for pelagic sealing or sea-otter hunting and use of ports of United States by such vessels.act Aug. 24, 1912, ch. 373, § 237 Stat. 500
Section 634, , , permitted natives to carry on pelagic fishing.act Aug. 24, 1912, ch. 373, § 337 Stat. 500
Section 635, , , prohibited importing illegally taken skins, and forfeiture thereof.act Aug. 24, 1912, ch. 373, § 437 Stat. 500

Termination of SectionsSections 632 to 643a were terminated on the authority of former when Japan abrogated the treaty on , eff. . Sections 632 to 644 were later specifically repealed by , .section 643a of this titleact Feb. 26, 1944, ch. 65, § 1858 Stat. 104Oct. 23, 1940Oct. 23, 1941
